query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_lessons,
  SUM(CASE WHEN scripture IS NOT NULL AND scripture != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_scripture,
  SUM(CASE WHEN scripture IS NULL OR scripture = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as without_scripture
FROM lessons;
